problem_solved: Hospitals and health systems lack real-time visibility into bed availability, patient flow, and operational capacity across their network, leading to bottlenecks and inefficient resource utilization
solution_description: AI-powered healthcare operations platform providing real-time patient flow management, bed management, and capacity optimization. Operations IQ ingests and analyzes data across the enterprise with workflow automation and decision intelligence. Covers 30% of US hospital beds and 8 of the largest health systems
notes: Leader in hospital operations and patient flow. Strong AI/automation capabilities. Critical for bed management and transfer center operations. High Varden fit for healthcare logistics infrastructure.
